title: Generic way to build first stage
body:
### Discussed in https://github.com/containers/buildah/discussions/5263
Originally posted by **vonbox** January 11, 2024 With `buildah bud --target=layer0 .` I can build the first stage of a multistage containerfile. Is there a way to specify the first layer without me needing to name it, or without needing to know the name? Something like `buildah bud --target=0 .`? I am trying to create a kinda generic script that should be able to build the first stage of any containerfile.

comments.body: Huh.  Can't transfer issues across organizations.  Gonna see if I can create one directly there.
